extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: all “By” rows were excluded; criminal proceedings against the company, directors, KMP, senior management, promoters and subsidiaries are all Nil, statutory/regulatory actions against all listed entities are Nil, and tax proceedings against the company (3) plus subsidiaries (5) total 8, excluding the directors’ personal tax matter. For the group-only quantified aggregate, I used the stated amounts against the Company of ₹805.34 million and against Subsidiaries of ₹28.55 million, totaling ₹833.89 million, converted from million to ₹83.389 crore; promoter/director and “By” amounts were excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹934.32 million as of September 30, 2025, converted to ₹93.432 crore, rather than a re-sum. The company-wide customer concentration for the latest full fiscal year, Financial Year 2025, is 73.17% for the top five and 88.57% for the top ten, measured as a percentage of revenue from operations; the Aerospace Segment concentration was not used because it is segment-specific. The litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, and the conversion applied is ₹1 million = ₹0.1 crore.
